headline: Record Bookings Cannot Hide Royal Caribbean’s Growing Fuel Problem
summary: Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE:RCL), the popular cruise line, is carrying real momentum into 2026, but a viral r/wallstreetbets post is crystallizing a risk bulls have been glossing over: oil is approaching $100 a barrel, and Royal Caribbean just committed to spending roughly $5 billion in capital expenditures this year alone. Shares are down 15% over ... Record Bookings Cannot Hide Royal Caribbean’s Growing Fuel Problem
